metadata.description: Tool dependency graph for Google Super and GitHub toolkits. An edge FROM→TO means tool FROM provides a parameter that tool TO requires. Built by analysing each tool's inputs/outputs and mapping the parameter flows.

nodes.label: List Threads
nodes.title:
List Threads
Retrieve all Gmail conversation threads. Returns thread_id list.
Provides: thread_id

nodes.label: Get Thread
nodes.title:
Get Thread
Fetch full details of a single Gmail thread. Requires thread_id.
Requires: thread_id

nodes.label: Reply to Thread
nodes.title:
Reply to Thread
Send a reply within an existing Gmail thread. Requires thread_id.
Requires: thread_id

nodes.label: List Messages
nodes.title:
List Messages
List Gmail messages (with optional query filters). Returns message_ids.
Provides: message_id

nodes.label: Get Message
nodes.title:
Get Message
Fetch full content of a specific Gmail message. Requires message_id.
Requires: message_id

nodes.label: Send Email
nodes.title:
Send Email
Compose and send a new Gmail message. Requires recipient email address.
Requires: email

nodes.label: Delete Message
nodes.title:
Delete Message
Permanently delete a Gmail message. Requires message_id.
Requires: message_id

nodes.label: List Drafts
nodes.title:
List Drafts
List all Gmail drafts. Returns draft_ids.
Provides: draft_id

nodes.label: Create Draft
nodes.title:
Create Draft
Create a new Gmail draft message. Returns draft_id.
Provides: draft_id

nodes.label: Get Draft
nodes.title:
Get Draft
Retrieve content of a specific Gmail draft. Requires draft_id.
Requires: draft_id

nodes.label: Send Draft
nodes.title:
Send Draft
Send an existing Gmail draft. Requires draft_id.
Requires: draft_id

nodes.label: List Labels
nodes.title:
List Labels
Retrieve all Gmail labels. Returns label_ids and names.
Provides: label_id

nodes.label: Create Label
nodes.title:
Create Label
Create a new Gmail label. Returns label_id.
Provides: label_id

nodes.label: Modify Email Labels
nodes.title:
Modify Email Labels
Add or remove labels on a Gmail message. Requires message_id + label_id.
Requires: message_id, label_id

nodes.label: Batch Delete Messages
nodes.title:
Batch Delete Messages
Permanently delete multiple Gmail messages. Requires message_ids.
Requires: message_id

nodes.label: Batch Modify Messages
nodes.title:
Batch Modify Messages
Apply label changes to up to 1000 messages. Requires message_ids + label_ids.
Requires: message_id, label_id

nodes.label: List Contacts
nodes.title:
List Contacts
List all Google Contacts. Returns contact names and email addresses.
Provides: email, contact_id

nodes.label: Search Contacts
nodes.title:
Search Contacts
Search contacts by name or email. Returns matching email addresses. Used to look up email from a person's name.
Provides: email, contact_id

nodes.label: List Calendars
nodes.title:
List Calendars
List all calendars on the user's calendar list. Returns calendar_ids.
Provides: calendar_id

nodes.label: Create Calendar
nodes.title:
Create Calendar
Create a new secondary Google Calendar. Returns calendar_id.
Provides: calendar_id

nodes.label: Get Calendar
nodes.title:
Get Calendar
Retrieve metadata for a specific calendar. Requires calendar_id.
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: Update Calendar
nodes.title:
Update Calendar
Update calendar metadata (title, timezone, etc.). Requires calendar_id.
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: Delete Calendar
nodes.title:
Delete Calendar
Permanently delete a secondary calendar. Requires calendar_id.
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: List Events
nodes.title:
List Events
List events in a calendar. Requires calendar_id. Returns event_ids.
Provides: event_id
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: Get Event
nodes.title:
Get Event
Retrieve full details of a calendar event. Requires calendar_id + event_id.
Requires: calendar_id, event_id

nodes.label: Create Event
nodes.title:
Create Event
Create a new event in a calendar. Requires calendar_id.
Provides: event_id
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: Update Event
nodes.title:
Update Event
Update an existing calendar event. Requires calendar_id + event_id.
Requires: calendar_id, event_id

nodes.label: Delete Event
nodes.title:
Delete Event
Delete a calendar event. Requires calendar_id + event_id.
Requires: calendar_id, event_id

nodes.label: Clear Calendar
nodes.title:
Clear Calendar
Delete all events from a primary calendar. Requires calendar_id.
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: List ACL Rules
nodes.title:
List ACL Rules
List access control rules for a calendar. Requires calendar_id. Returns rule_ids.
Provides: rule_id
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: Create ACL Rule
nodes.title:
Create ACL Rule
Grant sharing permission to a user/group/domain. Requires calendar_id.
Provides: rule_id
Requires: calendar_id

nodes.label: Delete ACL Rule
nodes.title:
Delete ACL Rule
Remove a sharing permission rule. Requires calendar_id + rule_id.
Requires: calendar_id, rule_id

nodes.label: Update ACL Rule
nodes.title:
Update ACL Rule
Fully update a calendar access rule. Requires calendar_id + rule_id.
Requires: calendar_id, rule_id

nodes.label: List Files
nodes.title:
List Files
List files in Google Drive. Returns file_ids and metadata.
Provides: file_id

nodes.label: Search Files
nodes.title:
Search Files
Search Drive files using query syntax. Returns matching file_ids.
Provides: file_id

nodes.label: Create File
nodes.title:
Create File
Create a new file in Google Drive. Returns file_id.
Provides: file_id

nodes.label: Get File Metadata
nodes.title:
Get File Metadata
Retrieve metadata for a specific Drive file. Requires file_id.
Requires: file_id

nodes.label: Delete File
nodes.title:
Delete File
Permanently delete a Drive file. Requires file_id.
Requires: file_id

nodes.label: Download File
nodes.title:
Download File
Download file content from Drive. Requires file_id.
Requires: file_id

nodes.label: Copy File
nodes.title:
Copy File
Duplicate a Drive file with advanced options. Requires file_id. Returns new file_id.
Provides: file_id
Requires: file_id

nodes.label: Comment on File
nodes.title:
Comment on File
Add a comment to a Drive file. Requires file_id.
Requires: file_id

nodes.label: Share File
nodes.title:
Share File
Grant sharing permissions to a Drive file. Requires file_id.
Requires: file_id

nodes.label: List Folders
nodes.title:
List Folders
List folders in Google Drive. Returns folder_ids.
Provides: folder_id

nodes.label: Move to Folder
nodes.title:
Move to Folder
Move a file into a folder (add parent). Requires file_id + folder_id.
Requires: file_id, folder_id

nodes.label: List Spreadsheets
nodes.title:
List Spreadsheets
List all Google Sheets spreadsheets in Drive. Returns spreadsheet_ids.
Provides: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: Create Spreadsheet
nodes.title:
Create Spreadsheet
Create a new Google Sheets spreadsheet. Returns spreadsheet_id.
Provides: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: Read Cell Ranges
nodes.title:
Read Cell Ranges
Read values from one or more cell ranges. Requires spreadsheet_id.
Requires: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: Add Sheet Tab
nodes.title:
Add Sheet Tab
Add a new sheet tab to a spreadsheet. Requires spreadsheet_id. Returns sheet_id.
Provides: sheet_id
Requires: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: Append Rows/Columns
nodes.title:
Append Rows/Columns
Add empty rows or columns to a sheet. Requires spreadsheet_id + sheet_id.
Requires: spreadsheet_id, sheet_id

nodes.label: Create Chart
nodes.title:
Create Chart
Create a chart from sheet data. Requires spreadsheet_id + sheet_id.
Requires: spreadsheet_id, sheet_id

nodes.label: Clear Cells
nodes.title:
Clear Cells
Clear cell content from an A1-notation range. Requires spreadsheet_id.
Requires: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: Write Cells
nodes.title:
Write Cells
Write values to one or more cell ranges. Requires spreadsheet_id.
Requires: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: Aggregate Column
nodes.title:
Aggregate Column
Perform sum/avg/count/min/max on filtered column data. Requires spreadsheet_id.
Requires: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: Auto-Resize Columns
nodes.title:
Auto-Resize Columns
Auto-fit column widths or row heights. Requires spreadsheet_id.
Requires: spreadsheet_id

nodes.label: List Task Lists
nodes.title:
List Task Lists
List all Google Task Lists. Returns tasklist_ids.
Provides: tasklist_id

nodes.label: Create Task List
nodes.title:
Create Task List
Create a new Google Task List. Returns tasklist_id.
Provides: tasklist_id

nodes.label: List Tasks
nodes.title:
List Tasks
List tasks in a task list. Requires tasklist_id. Returns task_ids.
Provides: task_id
Requires: tasklist_id

nodes.label: Get Task
nodes.title:
Get Task
Retrieve details of a specific task. Requires tasklist_id + task_id.
Requires: tasklist_id, task_id

nodes.label: Create Task
nodes.title:
Create Task
Create a new task in a task list. Requires tasklist_id.
Provides: task_id
Requires: tasklist_id

nodes.label: Update Task
nodes.title:
Update Task
Update an existing task. Requires tasklist_id + task_id.
Requires: tasklist_id, task_id

nodes.label: Delete Task
nodes.title:
Delete Task
Delete a task from a list. Requires tasklist_id + task_id.
Requires: tasklist_id, task_id

nodes.label: Clear Completed Tasks
nodes.title:
Clear Completed Tasks
Remove all completed tasks from a list. Requires tasklist_id.
Requires: tasklist_id

nodes.label: Bulk Create Tasks
nodes.title:
Bulk Create Tasks
Create multiple tasks efficiently. Requires tasklist_id.
Requires: tasklist_id

nodes.label: List Albums
nodes.title:
List Albums
List all Google Photos albums. Returns album_ids.
Provides: album_id

nodes.label: Create Album
nodes.title:
Create Album
Create a new Google Photos album. Returns album_id.
Provides: album_id

nodes.label: List Media Items
nodes.title:
List Media Items
List photos/videos from Google Photos. Returns media_item_ids.
Provides: media_item_id

nodes.label: Upload Media
nodes.title:
Upload Media
Upload and create multiple photos/videos. Returns media_item_ids.
Provides: media_item_id

nodes.label: Add Media to Album
nodes.title:
Add Media to Album
Add up to 50 media items to an album. Requires album_id + media_item_ids.
Requires: album_id, media_item_id

nodes.label: Get Media Details
nodes.title:
Get Media Details
Retrieve details for specified media items. Requires media_item_ids.
Requires: media_item_id

nodes.label: Add Album Enrichment
nodes.title:
Add Album Enrichment
Add text/location/map enrichment to an album. Requires album_id.
Requires: album_id

nodes.label: List GA4 Properties
nodes.title:
List GA4 Properties
List Google Analytics 4 properties. Returns property IDs.
Provides: ga4_property

nodes.label: Run Analytics Reports
nodes.title:
Run Analytics Reports
Fetch up to 5 GA4 reports in a single request. Requires property ID.
Requires: ga4_property

nodes.label: Run Pivot Reports
nodes.title:
Run Pivot Reports
Return multiple pivot table reports. Requires property ID.
Requires: ga4_property

nodes.label: Create Custom Dimension
nodes.title:
Create Custom Dimension
Add a custom dimension to a GA4 property. Requires property ID. Returns dimension_name.
Provides: dimension_name
Requires: ga4_property

nodes.label: Archive Custom Dimension
nodes.title:
Archive Custom Dimension
Remove a custom dimension from active use. Requires dimension_name (with property path).
Requires: dimension_name

nodes.label: List My Repos
nodes.title:
List My Repos
List repositories for the authenticated user. Returns owner + repo names.
Provides: owner, repo

nodes.label: List Org Repos
nodes.title:
List Org Repos
List repositories in an organization. Requires org name. Returns owner + repo.
Provides: owner, repo
Requires: org

nodes.label: Create Repo
nodes.title:
Create Repo
Create a new GitHub repository. Returns owner + repo.
Provides: owner, repo

nodes.label: Get Repo
nodes.title:
Get Repo
Get full repository metadata. Requires owner + repo.
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Delete Repo
nodes.title:
Delete Repo
Permanently delete a repository. Requires owner + repo.
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Fork Repo
nodes.title:
Fork Repo
Fork a repository to another account. Requires owner + repo.
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: List Branches
nodes.title:
List Branches
List branches for a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns branch_names.
Provides: branch_name
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Create Branch
nodes.title:
Create Branch
Create a new branch from a commit SHA. Requires owner + repo + sha.
Provides: branch_name
Requires: owner, repo, commit_sha

nodes.label: List Commits
nodes.title:
List Commits
List commits for a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns commit SHAs.
Provides: commit_sha
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Get Commit
nodes.title:
Get Commit
Fetch full details of a commit. Requires owner + repo + commit_sha.
Requires: owner, repo, commit_sha

nodes.label: Compare Commits
nodes.title:
Compare Commits
Compare two commits (diff). Requires owner + repo + two commit SHAs (BASE...HEAD format).
Requires: owner, repo, commit_sha

nodes.label: Create Blob
nodes.title:
Create Blob
Create a Git blob object from file content. Requires owner + repo. Returns blob_sha.
Provides: blob_sha
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Create Tree
nodes.title:
Create Tree
Create a Git tree from blobs. Requires owner + repo + blob_sha. Returns tree_sha.
Provides: tree_sha
Requires: owner, repo, blob_sha

nodes.label: Create Commit
nodes.title:
Create Commit
Create a Git commit from a tree + parent commit. Requires owner + repo + tree_sha + parent commit_sha. Returns new commit_sha.
Provides: commit_sha
Requires: owner, repo, tree_sha, commit_sha

nodes.label: Commit Multiple Files
nodes.title:
Commit Multiple Files
Atomically create/update/delete files in one commit. Requires owner + repo + branch_name.
Requires: owner, repo, branch_name

nodes.label: Comment on Commit
nodes.title:
Comment on Commit
Add a comment to a specific commit. Requires owner + repo + commit_sha.
Requires: owner, repo, commit_sha

nodes.label: Set Commit Status
nodes.title:
Set Commit Status
Set CI/CD status (pending/success/failure/error) on a commit. Requires owner + repo + commit_sha.
Requires: owner, repo, commit_sha

nodes.label: List Issues
nodes.title:
List Issues
List issues for a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns issue_numbers.
Provides: issue_number
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Get Issue
nodes.title:
Get Issue
Retrieve full details of an issue. Requires owner + repo + issue_number.
Requires: owner, repo, issue_number

nodes.label: Create Issue
nodes.title:
Create Issue
Open a new issue in a repository. Requires owner + repo.
Provides: issue_number
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Update Issue
nodes.title:
Update Issue
Edit an existing issue (title, body, state, etc.). Requires owner + repo + issue_number.
Requires: owner, repo, issue_number

nodes.label: Assign Users to Issue
nodes.title:
Assign Users to Issue
Assign up to 10 users to an issue. Requires owner + repo + issue_number.
Requires: owner, repo, issue_number

nodes.label: Add Labels to Issue
nodes.title:
Add Labels to Issue
Apply labels to an issue. Requires owner + repo + issue_number + label_names.
Requires: owner, repo, issue_number, label_name

nodes.label: List Repo Labels
nodes.title:
List Repo Labels
List all labels in a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns label_names.
Provides: label_name
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Create Label
nodes.title:
Create Label
Create a new label in a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns label_name.
Provides: label_name
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: List Pull Requests
nodes.title:
List Pull Requests
List open/closed PRs for a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns pull_numbers.
Provides: pull_number
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Get Pull Request
nodes.title:
Get Pull Request
Retrieve full PR details. Requires owner + repo + pull_number.
Requires: owner, repo, pull_number

nodes.label: Create Pull Request
nodes.title:
Create Pull Request
Open a new pull request. Requires owner + repo + head branch + base branch.
Provides: pull_number
Requires: owner, repo, branch_name

nodes.label: Merge Pull Request
nodes.title:
Merge Pull Request
Merge a pull request. Requires owner + repo + pull_number.
Requires: owner, repo, pull_number

nodes.label: Check PR Merged
nodes.title:
Check PR Merged
Check if a PR has been merged (HTTP 204 = merged). Requires owner + repo + pull_number.
Requires: owner, repo, pull_number

nodes.label: List Workflows
nodes.title:
List Workflows
List GitHub Actions workflows in a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns workflow_ids.
Provides: workflow_id
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: List Workflow Runs
nodes.title:
List Workflow Runs
List recent workflow run history. Requires owner + repo. Returns run_ids.
Provides: run_id
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Trigger Workflow
nodes.title:
Trigger Workflow
Manually trigger a workflow dispatch event. Requires owner + repo + workflow_id.
Requires: owner, repo, workflow_id

nodes.label: Cancel Workflow Run
nodes.title:
Cancel Workflow Run
Cancel a queued or in-progress workflow run. Requires owner + repo + run_id.
Requires: owner, repo, run_id

nodes.label: Approve Fork Workflow
nodes.title:
Approve Fork Workflow
Approve a workflow run from a fork PR. Requires owner + repo + run_id.
Requires: owner, repo, run_id

nodes.label: List Deployments
nodes.title:
List Deployments
List deployments for a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns deployment_ids.
Provides: deployment_id
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Create Deployment
nodes.title:
Create Deployment
Create a deployment targeting a ref (branch, tag, SHA). Requires owner + repo + ref.
Provides: deployment_id
Requires: owner, repo, branch_name

nodes.label: Update Deployment Status
nodes.title:
Update Deployment Status
Update the operational state of a deployment. Requires owner + repo + deployment_id.
Requires: owner, repo, deployment_id

nodes.label: List Releases
nodes.title:
List Releases
List releases for a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns release_ids.
Provides: release_id
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Get Release
nodes.title:
Get Release
Retrieve release details. Requires owner + repo + release_id.
Requires: owner, repo, release_id

nodes.label: Create Release
nodes.title:
Create Release
Create a new release (with tag). Requires owner + repo.
Provides: release_id
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: List My Orgs
nodes.title:
List My Orgs
List organizations for the authenticated user. Returns org names.
Provides: org

nodes.label: List Teams
nodes.title:
List Teams
List teams in an organization. Requires org. Returns team_slugs.
Provides: team_slug
Requires: org

nodes.label: Create Team
nodes.title:
Create Team
Create a new team in an organization. Requires org. Returns team_slug.
Provides: team_slug
Requires: org

nodes.label: List Org Members
nodes.title:
List Org Members
List members of an organization. Requires org. Returns usernames.
Provides: username
Requires: org

nodes.label: Update Team Membership
nodes.title:
Update Team Membership
Add/update a user's membership in a team. Requires org + team_slug + username.
Requires: org, team_slug, username

nodes.label: List Collaborators
nodes.title:
List Collaborators
List collaborators for a repository. Requires owner + repo. Returns usernames.
Provides: username
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Add Collaborator
nodes.title:
Add Collaborator
Grant user access to a repository. Requires owner + repo + username.
Requires: owner, repo, username

nodes.label: List Repo Invitations
nodes.title:
List Repo Invitations
List pending repository invitations. Requires owner + repo. Returns invitation_ids.
Provides: invitation_id
Requires: owner, repo

nodes.label: Accept Invitation
nodes.title:
Accept Invitation
Accept a repository collaboration invitation. Requires invitation_id.
Requires: invitation_id

nodes.label: Create Check Run
nodes.title:
Create Check Run
Report CI check status with annotations. Requires owner + repo + commit_sha (head_sha).
Requires: owner, repo, commit_sha

edges.label: media_item_id
edges.title: List Media Items → provides media_item_id → Add Media to Album

edges.label: label_name
edges.title: List Repo Labels → provides label_name → Add Labels to Issue
